name: Leonardo DRS, Inc.
description: Leonardo DRS, Inc. is a leading mid-tier defense technology provider that develops and manufactures advanced defense products for the U.S. military, intelligence agencies, and international allies. The company specializes in defense technologies across multiple domains, including advanced sensing, force protection, network computing, and electrical power and propulsion systems. Headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, Leonardo DRS is committed to delivering innovative, reliable, and cost-effective solutions to support national security and military readiness.
